summary: Feature M2-F2-verify-child-assignment completed successfully. The worker verified that child issue DAV-170 (id: 72d4f554-3fa5-4fb7-a7f9-fedd9ab1f0ad) is correctly assigned_to Worker Agent (5061a67b-5c78-47a9-b59a-d71612cd6129) with status=todo. All verification requirements from VAL-CUT-002 were satisfied.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The validation-state.json serves as the source of truth for discovered issues (parent and child). The worker correctly updated this shared state with the discoveredChild object containing the child's ID, assignment details, targetFolder, and artifactKind. This pattern ensures downstream M3 worker execution features have access to the discovered child issue without requiring rediscovery.
sharedStateObservations.relevance: This shared-state pattern for discovered issues is working well and should be maintained for future milestones. The discoveredChild structure provides all necessary context for worker execution: id, assigneeAgentId, targetFolder, artifactKind, and missionCell inheritance.

verificationCommands.result: Returned DAV-170 as child with proper parentId linkage

Verified Worker Agent ID: 5061a67b-5c78-47a9-b59a-d71612cd6129 (name: Worker Agent, status: idle)
